info.title: Image Placeholder Generator
info.description: This API allows developers to create customizable SVG placeholder images for their web projects. Users can specify dimensions, background and text colors, and custom text, making it an efficient tool for rapid prototyping. Generates lightweight, resolution-independent SVG images instantly with no dependencies or tracking.

get.description: Creates a square SVG placeholder image with the specified width. Height will equal width automatically.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: The width (and height) of the square image in pixels

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Custom text to display on the image. URL encoded strings supported (use + for spaces)

get.description: Creates a rectangular SVG placeholder image with specified width and height dimensions.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: The width of the image in pixels

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: The height of the image in pixels

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Custom text to display on the image. URL encoded strings supported (use + for spaces)

get.summary: Generate customized placeholder image with colors
get.description: Creates a rectangular SVG placeholder image with custom dimensions, background color, and text color. Colors should be specified as HEX codes without the # symbol.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: The width of the image in pixels

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: The height of the image in pixels

parameters.name: background
parameters.description: Background color as HEX code without the # symbol

parameters.name: text_color
parameters.description: Text color as HEX code without the # symbol

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Custom text to display on the image. URL encoded strings supported (use + for spaces)

tags.name: Placeholder Generation
tags.description: Generate customizable SVG placeholder images with various dimensions and colors
